included: Law No. 91/2025/QH15 on Personal Data Protection: Articles 1-39
Decree No. 356/2025/NĐ-CP implementing the Law on Personal Data Protection: Articles 1-42 and all 13 Appendix forms
Historical Decree No. 13/2023/NĐ-CP on Personal Data Protection: Articles 1-44 and all six Appendix forms, expressly marked repealed
scope.unitHashAlgorithm: SHA-256 over UTF-8 fullText with no trailing newline
scope.originalLanguagePolicy: Every corpus contains the complete Vietnamese original text. No unofficial or machine translation is substituted.
scope.englishTranslationPolicy: No complete issuing-authority or openly reusable official Government English version was verified. All three stored instruments now have complete, source-hash-locked, machine-assisted project English references that are explicitly nonofficial, without legal effect and CC BY 4.0; commercial translations were not copied. Decree 13/2023 remains historical and repealed.

statusReview.textVersionConclusion: The complete enacted Articles 1-39 were verified against both the signed National Assembly scan and searchable official Gazette.

transcriptionDisclosure.authorityStatement: The signed National Assembly publication and official Gazette control.
transcriptionDisclosure.method: Every non-whitespace character of every Article was matched to the searchable official Gazette. The secondary page supplies only paragraph boundaries and list structure.

statusReview.textVersionConclusion: The complete current implementing Decree was verified against the signed Government scan, official legal database and searchable official Gazette.
statusReview.repealEffect: Article 42(2) expressly terminates Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP from 1 January 2026.

transcriptionDisclosure.authorityStatement: The signed Government publication and official Gazette control.
transcriptionDisclosure.articles: All non-whitespace characters match the official Gazette. Thirteen secondary-page transcription differences across Articles 6, 12, 17, 18, 19, 34 and 42 were replaced by official Gazette wording and are individually recorded in the Gazette snapshot.
transcriptionDisclosure.appendixForms: All 13 forms are taken directly from the searchable official Gazette in PDF reading order. Table geometry is linearized without changing or adding text.

officialSources.role: controlling later repeal text, Decree 356/2025 Article 42(2)
older national-database history page whose displayed status lagged the later express repeal when reviewed

statusReview.controllingConclusion: Article 42(2) of later Decree 356/2025/NĐ-CP expressly ended Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP when Decree 356 entered into force on 1 January 2026.
statusReview.registryLagDisclosure: The older VBPL history page still displayed 'Còn hiệu lực' when reviewed. The later express repeal is controlling; this corpus must never be presented as current law.

transcriptionDisclosure.articles: All non-whitespace characters of Articles 1-44 match the searchable official Gazette. Five official-HTML-to-Gazette orthographic or capitalization differences across Articles 24, 27, 37 and 44 are resolved to Gazette wording and individually recorded in the Gazette snapshot.
transcriptionDisclosure.appendixForms: All six forms are taken directly from the searchable official Gazette in PDF reading order. Table geometry is linearized without changing or adding text. The signed scan provides independent page-level verification.

englishTranslation.currentLawWarning: Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP was repealed from 1 January 2026 and must not be presented as current Vietnamese law.

reuse.basis: Article 15(2) of the consolidated Vietnamese Law on Intellectual Property, No. 155/VBHN-VPQH (2025), excludes legislative texts, administrative texts, other judicial texts and their official translations from copyright protection.

integration.reason: This handoff is a Vietnam corpus-only deliverable. Shared application, registry, graph and generic-validation files were outside this delegated task's edit scope.
cautions: Treat vn-decree-13-2023 as historical-only and repealed; do not surface it as current law.
Appendix nodes use unitType 'appendix-form' and articleNumber values such as 'Form 01a'.
Provision-to-concept mappings were not generated in this corpus-only scope.
The Decree 356 official Gazette form text preserves PDF reading order; consumers may add presentation-only table layout but must not rewrite corpus text.
English views for all three Vietnamese corpora are nonofficial machine-assisted project references; the official Vietnamese text controls and the English must not be labeled official.
